[`var kAEEndsWith: OSType`](/documentation/coreservices/kaeendswith)The value of `operand1` ends with the value of `operand2` (for example, the string `"operand"` ends with the string `"and"`).[`var kAEEquals: OSType`](/documentation/coreservices/kaeequals)The value of `operand1` is equal to the value of `operand2`[`var kAEFinderEvents: OSType`](/documentation/coreservices/kaefinderevents)An event that the Finder accepts.
